evals.name: with-retro
evals.prompt: archive the test-archive-1-w project, add a brief retro: 'Tested the archive flow end-to-end. Status flip and folder move both worked cleanly. Worth doing again next quarter.'
evals.expected_output: Folder moved to 4-Archive/, CLAUDE.md status flipped to 'done', memory.md has the retro entry appended.

assertions.text: Folder beru-workspace/1-Projects/test-archive-1-w/ no longer exists after run
4-Archive/test-archive-1-w/memory.md contains the phrase 'Retro on archive' as a heading
4-Archive/test-archive-1-w/memory.md contains the retro text 'Status flip and folder move' (substring)

evals.name: skip-retro
evals.prompt: I'm done with test-archive-2-w, just move it to archive (skip retro)
evals.expected_output: Folder moved to 4-Archive/, CLAUDE.md status flipped to 'done', memory.md unchanged (no retro entry).

assertions.text: Folder beru-workspace/1-Projects/test-archive-2-w/ no longer exists after run
4-Archive/test-archive-2-w/memory.md does NOT contain a 'Retro on archive' heading

evals.name: minimal-trigger
evals.expected_output: Skill should still trigger and move the folder. Retro is optional (skill should ask or default to skipping in non-interactive contexts).

assertions.text: Folder beru-workspace/1-Projects/test-archive-3-w/ no longer exists after run
